next_steps: Check serum TSH, free T4, and T3 levels
Order serum and CSF paraneoplastic and autoimmune encephalitis panels (including anti-NMDA receptor antibodies)
Check serum ceruloplasmin and copper levels
Perform a 24-hour urine collection for porphobilinogen and delta-aminolevulinic acid
Continue supportive care with careful titration of anticonvulsants
Consult endocrinology and neurology services for specialized workup

differential_diagnoses: Hashimoto's encephalopathy (Steroid-Responsive Encephalopathy associated with Autoimmune Thyroiditis)
Voltage-gated potassium channel (VGKC) complex antibody-associated limbic encephalitis
Alcohol withdrawal syndrome with prolonged/complicated course
next_steps: Check serum TSH, free T4, T3, and thyroid-stimulating immunoglobulin (TSI)
Order comprehensive serum and CSF autoimmune/paraneoplastic encephalitis panels
Check serum anti-thyroid peroxidase (TPO) and anti-thyroglobulin antibodies
Perform 24-hour video EEG monitoring for subclinical seizures
Perform 24-hour urine collection for porphobilinogen and delta-aminolevulinic acid
Check serum ceruloplasmin and copper levels
Consult endocrinology and neurology services for a multidisciplinary evaluation
Consider an empiric trial of high-dose corticosteroids if autoimmune thyroiditis is strongly suspected
